title: danthonia decipiens
intro: Danthonia decipiens, also known as Poverty Grass or Poverty Oats, is a perennial grass species native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Danthonia decipiens include soothing irritated throats, easing congestion, and reducing inflammation in the body. Danthonia decipiens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
